slice: The Welcome screen's project cards gained a Generate a Card icon action (disabled until a World is Personal-published, enabled by one added line in the existing _annotateProjectBadges() check). Opens a standalone modal, reusing the same shell the Sign In form already proved can host a real live form: Label/Max Tries-or-Unlimited/Duration-or-Forever, a live derived-rarity preview, Generate, and a re-fetched minted-cards list with per-row soft Revoke. All card logic lives in a new shared js/cardPlatform.js (repo root) -- generate()/listMine()/revoke()/redeem() -- reusing ThemeRepositoryClient.getClient()/getSession() rather than a second config/session. Cards are minted with a randomized placement of a real constellation on a 10x10 grid; the constellation name is a reusable flavor label, never the security boundary -- the Card's own randomly-placed pattern is what's unique, matched by a new redeem_card() RPC (this platform's first SECURITY DEFINER function, supabase/schema.sql, a disclosed unexecuted draft) whose response never includes pattern/code/serial_no/constellation on any branch. A cross-owner grant extends the existing owner-only Personal Theme read policies so a redeemer (never the Theme's owner) can actually read what they redeemed. Verified via a new 47-assertion Playwright suite (a mocked ThemeRepositoryClient/CardPlatform, since live Supabase is unreachable from this sandbox) plus a static leak-proof check against the real redeem_card() SQL; both goldenBuild.js suites (v1 and v2) pass unchanged. See docs/VIHU_CARD_PLATFORM.md and CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
